summary: Implement agent-directed bus channels (targeted bus_message posts, inbox reader, session_boot surfacing) plus docs/receipts per the 2025-11-09 decision.

steps.title: Extend bus_message with agent targeting
steps.notes: Add --target flag, emit agent inbox messages alongside task posts, and carry a to=<role> field so downstream readers can filter direct messages.

steps.title: Ship bus_inbox helper + session_boot inbox surfacing
steps.notes: Create a helper to tail `_bus/messages/agent-<role>.jsonl` (filters, unread counts) and call it from session_boot so agents see their backlog.

steps.title: Document agent inbox workflow
steps.notes: Update docs/agents.md + parallel playbook with CLI usage, capture receipts, and log the new role channel convention.

checkpoint.description: Agent inbox tooling operational with docs/tests and referenced receipts
